Terms of Use

AI SDR by AnutechLabs provides information about AI agents, business automation workflows, and consultation services. Website submissions do not create a client engagement until a separate agreement is accepted.

Agent descriptions are examples of possible workflows. Final scope, pricing, integrations, and delivery timelines are confirmed after discovery and proposal approval.

Users must provide accurate contact and business information when requesting access, enquiries, or consultations.

This page is a product-ready draft and should be reviewed with legal guidance before production launch.
